problem id: 6890870d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  01011000 -> 10110000
  01010001 -> 10100010
  10001110 -> 00011101
  00010100 -> 00101000
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00000100 -> 00001000
  11010100 -> 10101001
  00110101 -> 01101010
  10011111 -> 00111111

query: 00111000
predicted answer: 01110000
